# Copilot Repository Instructions

This repository is a library of cross-agent skills.

- Treat `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` as the primary artifact and `skills/<name>/references/` as on-demand depth
- Treat `.agents/skills/` as the portable cross-agent example layer
- For frontend or setup work, follow `frontend-setup-standards.md`
- When changing a skill, keep the main file concise and move deeper material into references
- Update `README.md` when you add, remove, or materially reposition top-level skills
- Prefer editing only the targeted skill and its directly related example files
- Do not revert unrelated worktree changes
- If environment tooling is missing, do a lightweight manual verification and state the limitation clearly
